{{Quote|The lightclub is a giant-sized saber, with a massive handle and a thick blade. Lightclubs are often built by Houks or other Jedi of unusually large size.|[[Skarch Vaunk]]'s entry on lightclubs in ''[[The Jedi Path: A Manual for Students of the Force]]''|<ref name="The Jedi Path: A Manual for Students of the Force (real-life book)">[[The Jedi Path: A Manual for Students of the Force (real-life book)|''The Jedi Path: A Manual for Students of the Force'']]</ref>}}
The '''lightclub''', also known as a '''great lightsaber''' or '''greatsaber''', was a weapon similar to a [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]]. However, special focusing crystals and power systems enabled this rare lightsaber to project a blade up to three meters in length. These large lightsabers were generally used only by beings of immense stature. [[Gorc]], a mutated [[Gamorrean/Legends|Gamorrean]] [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]], used such a weapon.

{{Weapon-stub}}
